channel.title: Interactive on Ben DeMouth
channel.description: Recent content in Interactive on Ben DeMouth

item.title: All Team's GPI
item.description: library(plotly) library(readr) gpidata <- read_csv("C:\\Users\\bende\\Desktop\\bendemouth\\gpidata.csv") I recently wrote an article on the top-10 teams in a stat I invented called the Greatness Polarity Index. If you were wondering how your team stacked up, check out this interactive graph below. gpigraph<- plot_ly(data = gpidata, x= ~off_gpi, y= ~def_gpi, text = ~paste(season, team)) gpigraph
